questions.question: What famous landmark or landmark scene is shown in this image?
questions.rgb_answer: The image shows the Kiyomizu-Dera temple, a famous landmark located in Kyoto, Japan. It is one of the most iconic temples in Japan and is known for its large wooden stage that extends out from the main hall, offering a panoramic view of the surrounding city. The temple was designated as a UNESCO World Heritage site in 1994 and is a significant cultural and religious site in Japan.
